title: Bideawee
description: Bideawee is a no-kill animal rescue and shelter located in NYC, Wantagh, and Westhampton. The organization offers a variety of services including adoptions, medical care, pet therapy, and fostering opportunities. Bideawee aims to strengthen the human-animal bond through compassionate care for both pets and their owners. Its targeted clients include individuals and families seeking to adopt or foster pets, as well as volunteers looking to support animal welfare.
